title: Strong Asian demand pushed global gas prices higher
section_path: Strong Asian demand pushed global gas prices higher
section_path_text: Strong Asian demand pushed global gas prices higher
summary:
Main
Profit taking continued to weigh on prices across energy and metal markets. A weaker USD helped push precious metals higher. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-05-31 101633.png | assets/2024-05-31_strong-asian-demand-pushed-global-gas-prices-higher_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_54d33e133d86.png

Market Commentary
Global gas prices gained amid heightened concerns over strong Asian demand.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Global gas prices gained amid heightened concerns over strong Asian demand. Extreme weather is putting pressure on Asian power markets.
